refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution
Enable rapid recovery from faults or failures

candidate_dps: Redundant system components and fault-tolerant design
Automated fault detection and recovery procedures
selected_dp.selected_dp: Redundant system components and fault-tolerant design

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically addresses minimizing downtime independently, reducing coupling with other DPs.

assumptions_risks: Assumes redundancy can be implemented within cost and weight constraints
Risk that redundancy may increase system complexity and maintenance effort
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating predictive maintenance DP in next refinement level to further improve availability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components and subsystems responsible for operational availability including redundant hardware and fault-tolerant mechanisms

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends operational status and health data to NGHE Solution for monitoring.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and recovery instructions from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as redundancy and fault tolerance are primarily physical vehicle functions.
Moderate containment due to system-level monitoring and coordination.
Low containment; teleoperation mainly controls but does not implement redundancy.
Minimal containment; safety services focus on alerts and safety compliance.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Redundancy and fault tolerance are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maximize ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for system-level monitoring may cause interface complexity.
Risk of insufficient coordination with Teleoperation during fault recovery.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface protocols between Vehicle and NGHE Solution to manage monitoring and recovery coordination.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing redundancy and fault tolerance to meet availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for monitoring and recovery coordination.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for the selected DP, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring vehicle uptime and telemetry data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of availability responsibility to Vehicle module is clear and aligns with physical implementation.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for telemetry and tasking.
Plan next level refinement to incorporate predictive maintenance and automated recovery DPs.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, interface definitions and coordination between Vehicle and NGHE Solution require refinement to reduce diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution
Enable rapid recovery from faults or failures

revise.why: To define clearer interface protocols and ownership boundaries between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.

assumptions: Redundancy can be physically implemented within Vehicle module constraints.
Telemetry and tasking interfaces are sufficient for coordination.
open_risks: Interface complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution may impact system integration.
Potential coordination gaps with Teleoperation during fault recovery.
evidence_needed: Interface specification documents between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
